key_requirements: R1: queue_mod.rs (4%) — mb_queue_Queue/LifoQueue/PriorityQueue construction, queue_items_ptr null/valid/non-dict paths, mb_queue_put/get (FIFO, empty, invalid), mb_queue_empty/qsize/full — all branches; concurrent put/get via std::thread
R2: statistics_mod.rs (5%) — extract_floats (int items, float items, empty, non-list); mean/median (odd/even/empty); mode/variance/stdev/geometric_mean/harmonic_mean — empty guard and data branches
R3: shlex_mod.rs (7%) — extract_str/extract_list (Str vs non-Str); mb_shlex_split (plain, quoted, mixed, empty); mb_shlex_quote (safe/unsafe/empty); mb_shlex_join (non-empty, empty list)

R4: calendar_mod.rs (8%) — mb_calendar_isleap (×400→true, ÷100¬400→false, ÷4¬100→true, other→false); leapdays (positive range, zero); monthrange (31/30/Feb-leap/Feb-nonleap/invalid); month_name (13 elements, index-0 empty); day_name (7 elements); weekday (known date, m<3 Zeller branch)
Test strategy: inline #[cfg(test)] blocks, no coverage-exclusion annotations, measure with cargo llvm-cov --branch, target ≥50% line coverage per file
Batch B — ffi/c_types.rs (0%): pure Rust type assertions, no C library needed
CType::display_name — all 17 match arms: Void, Int8..Int64, UInt8..UInt64, Float, Double, Bool, ConstChar, MutChar, Pointer (recursive), ConstPointer (recursive), Named
CType Clone/PartialEq: eq/neq assertions for primitive and compound variants
CFunction, CParam, CStruct, CField, CEnum, CEnumVariant, CHeader: construct + Clone + PartialEq; CHeader::default() + push
Tests are inline #[cfg(test)] mod tests — c_types.rs already has a test block; verify it compiles and is counted by llvm-cov
R3: CType enum — exact 17 variants (Void, Int8/16/32/64, UInt8/16/32/64, Float, Double, Bool, ConstChar, MutChar, Pointer(Box<CType>), ConstPointer(Box<CType>), Named(String))

CFunction (name, params: Vec<CParam>, return_type: CType), CParam (name, ty), CStruct (name, fields: Vec<CField>), CField (name, ty), CEnum (name, variants), CEnumVariant (name, value: Option<i64>), CHeader (functions, structs, enums) — all derive Debug+Clone+PartialEq
CType::display_name() is the sole method — all 17 branches must reach ≥50% line coverage in this change
File is 272 LOC with inline test block; tests already present but coverage not being measured — investigate why 0% and ensure cargo test -p cclab-mamba counts them
Inline #[cfg(test)] mod tests strategy (not fixture-based conformance tests)
Integration test files: tests/stdlib_coverage_lower_tests.rs (already contains queue concurrent test), tests/ffi_tests.rs (already imports c_types::*)
cargo test -p cclab-mamba runs all inline tests; cargo llvm-cov --branch measures coverage
FFI pipeline (cbindgen.rs, stub_gen.rs) uses CType from c_types.rs — background context showing why c_types.rs types must be correct and well-tested
shlex module expected semantics — background for shlex_split/quote/join behavior
calendar module expected semantics — background for isleap/leapdays/monthrange/weekday behavior
